name: Matango Den
Description: Deep within the Forest Dungeon are remote sections which are not meant to be explored by adventurers. One such area hosts a gathering of matangos who are perfectly comfortable with their restful isolation, but who do not mind being summoned from time to time to do battle with adventurers venturing into the dungeon. Perhaps they would be happy to get some unexpected company too?

In fact, that worrisome concern grows downright gnawing as you realize not only that your surroundings have gradually been growing darker and damper, but also that you haven't encountered a single living soul in quite some time...
